---
title: "Analysis"
author: "Hayden Simm"
date: "2026-03-17"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

Loading in dataframes 

```{r}
killi<-read_csv("Data_Set/HS_MD_killifish.csv")

str(killi)

```

Changing predictor Acclimation temperature and Acclimation salinity to factors 
```{r}
killi$`Accliamtion Temperature`<- factor(killi$`Accliamtion Temperature)
killi$`Acclimation Salinity`<- factor(killi$`Acclimation Salinity)

str(killi)
```
